item.label: standard-0010-mcp-server-impl
item.summary: Implement standard-0010 MCP server development rules

body:
# Description

Implement standard-0010 MCP server development rules.

# Cancellation Reason

This task was created as a generic placeholder during request-19 compliance review but lacks actionable content. The task description is too vague to be actionable - it references implementing rules without specifying:
- Which specific MCP servers need changes
- What specific compliance issues exist
- What changes need to be made

Standard-0010 compliance review during request-19 found that all MCP servers (audiagentic-planning_mcp.py, audiagentic-knowledge/mcp_server.py) are already compliant with standard-0010. They follow the FastMCP stdio transport pattern with comprehensive docstrings.

# Next Steps

No action required. MCP servers are already compliant with standard-0010.
